data.name: Sex & Blood: Vampires
data.detailed_description:
Explore the city imbued with the gloomy atmosphere of night and neon, work your way through it to solve the mystery that's been eating you for years, fight hot vampire hotties, improve your skills and buy powerful implants - the game has an RPG-styled fight system and a roguelike mode to take a fun break from the story!

In a cyberpunk world ravaged by mutation, vampires with superhuman abilities have enslaved humanity, turning people into nothing more than food and slaves - you're not happy with that, to say the least. Years ago, your friend’s family was brutally murdered by vampires, and Kaira herself disappeared without a trace. Ever since, you’re on a mission of vengeance, fighting vampires to grow stronger in the hopes of finding her.

The story begins as you return to your hometown, a city divided by different vampire gangs. You’re hired to take down the city’s most powerful vampire – the mysterious Queen. Investigation leads you to using every trick in the book – intimidation, bribery, and murder – to navigate through the overtaken city, find the local gang leader and discover the human meat processing factory.

After your cover gets blown, and you fight everyone there, you head to the corporate tower, inside which you’ll face a few other queen's henchwomen until you find the Queen herself. Who’s she? Where’s Kaira? What will happen when you finally meet? How will the final fight end? Play and find out!

Features:
  • Adult themes 🔞 - loss, revenge, determination and lots of sex, of course!
  • Top-notch visuals 🌟 - neon nighttime futuristic vistas with an extremely stylish high-quality rendering.
  • Next-level animation 🎞 - lush, smooth and juicy animations showcasing the action from many angles.
  • Intriguing detective plot 🕵️‍♀️ - trust us, you don’t expect the final twist.
  • Fighting system ⚔ - battle the hotties in the turn-based dice & stats system in order to get what you need.
  • Character progression 🔼 - improve your stats, install implants and build the character the way YOU like it!
  • Roguelike mini-game - getting tired of reading? No problem, launch the roguelike and fight vampire girlies one after the other!

data.short_description: You’re a hot futa girl trying to settle old scores - you’ll have to navigate the enigmatic city to fight and bang hot vampires, find their queen and investigate the disappearance of your friend in the gritty, cyberpunk-themed visual novel packed with RPG combat elements - Sex & Blood: Vampires!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
